Column box 'わからなくなったら絵に描いてみる' is captured as a term entity with full definition matching image text. The en definition includes a self-referential phrase about 'this book' — low concern, consistent with source material.

reviewer_notes: All 4 entities match visible page content: exam tip figure, section heading, 業務要件 term definition, and column box.
